creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Please change maintainer to Josh Carroll (josh.carroll@gmail.com).  He 
has agreed to adopt the port:

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Hi Jason,

Sure, I can take over for you if you'd like. I'll work on a patch for
the Makefile and get it attached to the PR in the mean time.

Thanks,
Josh


On Sat, Sep 25, 2010 at 6:39 PM, Jason Bacon <jwbacon@tds.net> wrote:

> >
> > Hello Josh,
> >
> > Would you like to take over as maintainer of the p5-usb port?
> >
> > I no longer use it, nor the software that depends on it which prompted me to
> > create the port.
> >
> > Regards,
> >
> >   Jason
> >

--

Jason W. Bacon
